description_long: This plant pot is a robust, ancient-style vessel with a round, deep bowl supported by three sturdy cylindrical legs. The exterior is adorned with intricate, geometric relief patterns reminiscent of traditional East Asian bronze ware, giving it a historical and ornamental appearance. Two thick, upright handles rise from the rim on opposite sides, each with a rectangular opening for easy gripping or lifting. The surface displays a weathered patina with a mix of greenish, gray, and reddish-brown hues, suggesting age and exposure to the elements. The interior is spacious and shows signs of wear, with some discoloration and residue visible. The overall form is solid and functional, suitable for holding medium-sized plants or decorative arrangements.
description: A heavy, tripod plant pot with ornate geometric patterns, upright handles, and a weathered, patinated surface. Its robust form and historical style make it both functional and decorative.
description_view_0: Front view showing the deep bowl, two upright handles, and detailed geometric patterns on the body.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curvature of the bowl, one handle in profile, and the three supporting legs.
description_view_2: Rear view with both handles visible, emphasizing the symmetry and the full extent of the decorative motifs.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the depth of the pot, the texture of the surface, and the sturdy tripod base.
attribute_placement_context: commonly used as a decorative planter in traditional or historical outdoor settings
